name: Ad Matrem Vocatus
descriptionTemplate: Thais gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Immediately gain 1 {Scion of Purity}. Whenever a Posse is used, transform an {Embryo} in hand into a {Scion of Purity}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Thais gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Immediately gain 1 {Scion of Purity}. Whenever a Posse is released, transform 1 {Embryo} in hand into 1 {Scion of Purity}. {Ritual of Abundance} additionally places 1 extra copy into your hand.
